ProposedRoute: Declare a finite parent perturbation basis before target scoring.
Derive or declare the reduced branch equation F_B(Phi,B)=0 from the Tau parent branch model.
Compute the reduced linearization L_B^red from F_B on the frozen branch domain.
Freeze invertible branch subspace, null-mode exclusions, and regularization convention.
Use deltaB_star = -(L_B^red)^-1 D_Phi F_B[deltaPhi] after L_B^red exists.
Define M_parent(Phi,B) as the Tau-side morphology variable feeding covariance.
Define P_morph(Phi,B) independent of P5C v3 outcome and target residuals.
Differentiate M_proj with respect to Phi after M_parent and P_morph are frozen.
Differentiate M_proj with respect to B after M_parent and P_morph are frozen.
Freeze D_M C as a linear map from morphology response to covariance response.
Reuse frozen observable coordinate basis only if it is declared before delta_C_Tau generation.
Freeze sign, Frobenius/trace normalization, and zero-denominator policy before support extraction.
Hash inputs and prove absence of held-out residuals, v3 gain pattern, and post-score family selection.
